title: Technical validation and calibration protocol for PET perfusion measurements using a dynamic flow phantom
author: Teuho, Jarmo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report is a technical validation and calibration protocol for PET perfusion measurements using a dynamic flow phantom. It defines a standard acquisition protocol of dynamic PET perfusion measurements between different PET systems and imaging centres by using information from a multi-centre phantom study between partners.
steps_raw: This report is a technical validation and calibration protocol for PET perfusion measurements using a dynamic flow phantom. It defines a standard acquisition protocol of dynamic PET perfusion measurements between different PET systems and imaging centres by using information from a multi-centre phantom study between partners.
